_comment: model_int → AC nameplate watts mapping. The model_int comes from the `model` column of the ECU's /home/database.db `id` table. Add an entry for each APsystems submodel encountered. To derive a value: read /tmp/powerALL.conf (the fleet total APsystems' main.exe computes) and SELECT id, model FROM id, then solve for the per-model values when the fleet's hardware is known.
